# Enfuvirtide 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Enfuvirtide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Enfuvirtide</strong> 目前有 <strong>26 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Enfuvirtide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Fuzeon is indicated in combination with other antiretroviral medicinal products for the treatment of HIV-1-infected patients who have received treatment with and failed on regimens containing at...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（98.7%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（98.2%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（98.2%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（97.4%）</li>
<li>ulceration of vulva（89.6%）</li>
<li>vulvar neoplasm（88.7%）</li>
<li>vulvitis（88.6%）</li>
<li>commissural lip fistula（77.8%）</li>
<li>osteoradionecrosis of the mandible（77.4%）</li>
<li>burning mouth syndrome（77.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/enfuvirtide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
